summary: Completed S2PCT06 authoritative research institution, laboratory, industry technical report, and product technical note metadata-only no-send shadow evidence while preserving Stage 1 arXiv local production boundaries and routing next S2PC work to S2PCT07 D2 source-domain qualification.
binding_rationale: S2PCT06 authoritative report source shadow evidence is complete locally. The report requires a passing S2PCT05 engineering signal report, observes all four required report types, validates publisher identity, interest relation, evidence level, version/source traceability, and traces every report to a known engineering signal and canonical document.
model_delta: Added MOD-ADP-059 authoritative report source shadow path; implementation remains metadata-only and side-effect free.
formula_delta: Added FORM-ADP-061 authoritative report source formula and refreshed CLI/stage2-linked machine fingerprints after adding the authoritative report command path. No production ranking, SMTP, Release, schedule, video, PDF, full-text, paid API, paywall, marketing material, or production source-domain formula behavior changed.
parameter_delta: Added PARAM-ADP-407 through PARAM-ADP-415 for authoritative report model id, acceptance id, task id, required report types, allowed publisher types, accepted identity states, accepted interest relations, accepted evidence levels, and ledger filename.
tests_run: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/adp_s2pct06_lean_after_fix PYTHONPATH=scripts:arxiv-daily-push/src python3 scripts/lean_governance.py check-render --project arxiv-daily-push
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/adp_s2pct06_root_discover_after_fix PYTHONPATH=scripts:arxiv-daily-push/src python3 -m unittest discover -s tests/governance -p 'test_*.py' -q
test_results: authoritative_report_taxonomy_gate: pass with research_institution_report, lab_technical_report, industry_technical_report, and product_technical_note
publisher_identity_gate: pass; interest_relation_gate: pass; evidence_level_gate: pass; traceability_gate: pass
shadow persistence writes report and four ledger rows with all production flags false
changed-only governance semantic sync: errors 0 warnings 0
V7.1 task-pack validator: PASS task_count 98 finding_count 53 errors 0 warnings 0
manifest JSON and events/development_events JSONL parse: OK
risks: S2PCT07 D2 source-domain qualification and cross-type calibration is not implemented yet.
V7.1 P0/P1 and S2PMT07 independent review still block D2 source-domain acceptance, Stage2 production acceptance, and integrated production acceptance.
Authoritative report metadata must not be treated as full text, formal source-domain acceptance, marketing acceptance, or production-mail inclusion.
rollback: Revert S2PCT06 authoritative report additions in stage2_sources.py, CLI, fixture/tests, governance registrations, phase record, event, manifest, root-lock pointer, and rendered governance sync.
